mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operate_log (title, business_type, method, request_method, operator_type, operator_name, dept_name, url, ip, location, param, result, status, error_msg, operate_time, cost_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{businessType}, #{method}, #{requestMethod}, #{operatorType}, #{operatorName}, #{deptName}, #{url}, #{ip}, #{location}, #{param}, #{result}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{operateTime}, #{costTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_operate_log ol WHERE ol.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ol.operate_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_operate_log WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT request_method as name, COUNT(*) as count FROM sys_operate_log WHERE operate_time >= #{startTime} AND operate_time <= #{endTime} AND request_method IS NOT NULL AND request_method != '' GROUP BY request_method ORDER BY count DESC
